title: The ShadyBunch
description:
Ever wanted to explore magic as a law-loving scientist? Command airships by night and be an interior designer by day? Or, a Pixelated chef running two restaurants in your new metropolis city? It can all be yours! 

Step into the shade, lets bunch together!
body:
![ShadyBunch Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937cc8a507873234245694ee93cf9911f4554c91_0.webp)  
Welcome! This is the initial release of The ShadyBunch SMP Pack! This will be a periodically, seasonally, updated modpack that will focus on primarily providing content, support, and flavor for The ShadyBunch Content SMP.

This modpack was made with LOVE! for all of the shady bunch members. However, anyone is free to download and try the pack out. There are well over 200 mods in this modpack ranging from world exploration to the end dimension being reimagined all together. Find a beat, stick to a rythmn and see where being shady will get you!

The pack has two primary focuses. The first is to encourage exploration organically through lore-based buildings, mod-driven exploration, and through resource-driven gathering/exploration.

The second focus is on Cobblemon and all of its integrations with the rest of the modpack.
